pre_arrival_items.task: Meta TF SDK Quick Start docs 통독 (~10 min)
RPi5 + M.2 HAT+ + microSD 32GB+ + USB-C 5A PSU 확보
RPi OS 64-bit (Bookworm) ISO download + microSD flash 준비

rpi5_setup_steps.cmd: Flash RPi OS 64-bit (Bookworm+) -> microSD via Raspberry Pi Imager
Mount AKD1000 M.2 card on M.2 HAT+, secure with screw
Boot RPi5 -> sudo apt update && sudo apt full-upgrade -y
lspci | grep -i akida   # expect: BrainChip Holdings, Akida AKD1000

sdk_install_steps.cmd: sudo apt install -y python3-venv python3-pip libffi-dev
pip install mne numpy scipy   # optional for EEG ingest

abort_codes.fallback: Reboot + reseat M.2; if persists, vendor RMA

abort_codes.trigger: pip install akida fails (ARM64 wheel missing)
abort_codes.fallback: F-AK-1: x86 host (mac/ubu1) inference, RPi5 ADM encoder only
Recreate venv with pip install tensorflow==2.15 pin

abort_codes.trigger: akida.devices() returns empty (kernel module not loaded)
abort_codes.fallback: sudo modprobe akida; if missing, dkms rebuild

d0_success_criterion: smoke test 2 (MNIST cnn2snn -> AKIDA forward) returns non-zero output shape -> proceed to D+1
